overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), starting at a sunlit intersection with elevated highways, proceeding along wide avenues with glass skyscrapers, and entering a narrow neon-lit commercial street dense with holographic advertisements and corporate signage.

events.description: begins crossing the street from the sidewalk
futuristic car passes by on the right side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across a sunlit intersection toward a futuristic city block with glass towers

futuristic black car driving along the street

yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a bright sunlit intersection in a futuristic city. The camera crosses the street toward a massive glass corporate tower while an elevated highway structure looms overhead. A futuristic car passes on the right as the pedestrian approaches the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide pedestrian avenue lined with palm trees and corporate towers

events.description: camera tilts upward to admire the tall glass building facade
passing by large digital billboard displays on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the wide sidewalk while looking up at the towering glass architecture and palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm tree with full fronds lining the sidewalk edge
array of large holographic advertisement screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide sunlit avenue, the camera tilts up to admire a massive glass corporate tower with teal neon accents. Palm trees line the right side of the path while digital billboards become visible in the distance on the left. The elevated highway recedes to the right background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with dense holographic advertising and corporate signage

events.description: turns right into a narrower street canyon lined with billboards
passing large red Arasaka corporate signage on the right building

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow commercial street and walking past various pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in teal shirt and shorts walking toward the camera
group of pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: dark building facade with hexagonal texture pattern and teal neon trim
large corporate logo with 'ARASAKA EXTREME PERFORMANCE' text and red circular emblem
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street with glass sides
large purple holographic advertisement showing a hand holding a food product

segments.scene_description: Turning right into a narrower commercial canyon, the street becomes enclosed by buildings covered in holographic advertisements. The prominent Arasaka corporate sign appears on the right, while a pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural sun and reflected neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon canyon with multiple holographic advertisements and crosswalk

events.description: passing the large 'Set Sail for Flavor' advertisement on the right
approaching intersection with yellow crosswalk markings visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a dense corridor of neon advertisements toward an intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in dark jacket walking past the camera from right to left
child in green shirt running across the path

entered.detail: large vertical advertisement with 'EL GUAPO' text and character image
bright teal neon lighting along the base of the building facade

segments.scene_description: Deep in the neon canyon, the camera passes the prominent 'Set Sail' billboard and an 'El Guapo' advertisement while approaching a pedestrian bridge overhead. The street is filled with holographic displays and pedestrians, creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere as the camera moves toward the next intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open urban intersection into a dense, neon-lit commercial canyon. It begins by crossing a sunlit street toward a massive glass corporate tower as an elevated highway looms overhead and a futuristic car glides past. As the camera moves along a wide avenue lined with palm trees, the view tilts upward to reveal teal neon accents on the skyscrapers before the highway recedes into the background. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, transitioning from the open sunlight into a narrower street enclosed by holographic advertisements and a prominent Arasaka corporate sign. Finally, the environment deepens into a cyberpunk atmosphere, passing 'Set Sail' and 'El Guapo' billboards under a pedestrian bridge while moving through a crowd of pedestrians toward the next intersection.
